_note: David's siblings, appended to Jesse's union (David already exists there). 1 Chronicles 2:13-15 names seven sons with David seventh; 1 Samuel 16:10-11 counts eight, so one brother is unnamed in scripture. Sisters Zeruiah and Abigail per 1 Chronicles 2:16. Sorts after 07_biblical so Jesse & David exist.

an eighth son
1 Samuel 16 counts eight sons; scripture names only seven

Zeruiah

David's sister; mother of Amasa · 1 Chron 2:16-17
